column2: Tell me your why: Why are you here?

column1: HABIT 1: 3-4 meals per day; no snacking in-between (note why we had snack if we have one. Was it hunger, boredom, emotion?)
Track your treats (no need to make a big change here, just looking to see where we are at)
Read Habit 1 in Lean Habits Pg. 35 and Habit 11 Pg. 118
Begin tracking your dailies (sleep, water, steps)
If you have a snack let me know why in the box.
Each time you miss a meal, put an "N" for "no" in the column.
If there are notes you'd like to document, please leave them in the "Notes."
2. Eat 3-4 meals each day, no snacking
3. Eat while not distracted (television, cell phone, work) - Y = yes, distracted; N = not distracted
5. Did you snack/emotionally eat? If yes, why? What emotion was it, or were you really hungry?
6. Did you have a treat (this could be with a meal, not just a snack) Week 1-3 is less about changing this habit and just creating awareness w/ where we are with it
7. Write down your non-scale victory "win" of the day (does NOT have to be food/exercise related)

column12: What was it and how much of it?
